3189870.name: Clash of the Kings
3189870.description:
Clash of the Kings


Build your army lords, the time has come to fight!

Single-Player:
Battle against fierce foes with your glorious recruits! Level them up, upgrade them, name them! Or let them parish! The choice is yours!

Multi-player:
Fight against other players armies plunder their loot, and gain much more gold and XP!


Decisions & Randomness:
As a new recruit, you could have vastly different stats than the previous. Sometimes it's worth the watch to let the old parish!
Almost all items have random stats, even the most fierce foe could parish to a lucky blow, always an underdog, always a chance!

Game-Play:
Level up, and grind your way to the top. As a lord, your new recruits will happily kill/die for you.
Constantly manage your economy to support your impressive army, battle random, and dangerous foes.
3189870.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
